description:
You are a platform engineer tidying up a small demo repository located at:

/home/user/project

Inside that directory there are two configuration files that need simultaneous edits so the CI/CD pipeline keeps working with the same version numbers everywhere.

1. /home/user/project/.github/workflows/ci.yml  
   • Currently specifies Node 16.  
   • Must be changed to Node 18.

2. /home/user/project/pyproject.toml  
   • Currently declares project version 0.1.0.  
   • Must be bumped to 0.2.0.

Acceptance criteria the automated grader will check:

a) YAML file  
   • The scalar node-version must read exactly 18 (without quotes) or '18' (single-quoted) or "18" (double-quoted).  
   • No other part of ci.yml may be altered.

b) TOML file  
   • In the [tool.poetry] table the key version must read exactly "0.2.0".  
   • Nothing else inside pyproject.toml may be changed.

c) Change-tracking file  
   • A new text file named /home/user/project/update_report.log must be created.  
   • It must contain exactly two lines, with no blank lines before, after, or between them, and with a single newline character (ASCII 0x0A) after each line:  
     ci.yml node-version updated from 16 to 18  
     pyproject.toml version updated from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0  
   • Capitalisation, spacing, and punctuation must be identical to the lines above.

Permitted approach: This is classified as a “simple single-command” task. After thinking, you should be able to accomplish all edits and the report creation using a single command line (for example through a short inline script, or by chaining tools). Feel free to inspect the files first, but the actual modifications and report generation must happen with just one final command.

Make sure you stay in /home/user/project while you run that one command so that the relative paths inside the repository resolve correctly.
truth:
Initial state of /home/user/project/.github/workflows/ci.yml (tabs shown as two spaces):
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '16'

Expected final state of the same file:
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '18'

Initial state of /home/user/project/pyproject.toml:
[tool.poetry]
name = "demo"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Demo project"

Expected final state of /home/user/project/pyproject.toml:
[tool.poetry]
name = "demo"
version = "0.2.0"
description = "Demo project"

The grader will also verify that
/home/user/project/update_report.log
exists with exactly these two lines and line-feeds:

ci.yml node-version updated from 16 to 18
pyproject.toml version updated from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0

No extra whitespace (spaces or tabs) is allowed at the start or end of either line.

Permissions:
• /home/user/project and everything inside it are owned by user:user and writable by the current user.
name: task_000000_5d83d211
